fields.name: attainment_pct
fields.db_type: NUMERIC(8,4) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (CASE WHEN target_amount > 0 THEN (actual_amount / target_amount) * 100 ELSE 0 END) STORED

fields.name: avg_invoice_value
fields.db_type: NUMERIC(15,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (CASE WHEN invoice_count > 0 THEN total_revenue / invoice_count ELSE 0 END) STORED

events.description: Emitted when background report generation completes
Emitted when a target reaches 100% attainment
Emitted when a target is projected to miss
Emitted when cohort analysis computation finishes

flows.name: Track Revenue
steps: Auto-create revenue events: invoice paid triggers POST /revenue-events with event_type=invoice_paid
Subscription billing cycle paid triggers event_type=subscription_payment

flows.name: Generate Revenue Report
steps: Background job aggregates revenue_events and builds result_data

flows.name: MRR Movement Analysis
steps: Compute: new_mrr (first subscription payments), expansion_mrr (upgrades), contraction_mrr (downgrades), churned_mrr (cancelled)
Derive net_new_mrr = new_mrr + expansion_mrr - contraction_mrr - churned_mrr

flows.name: Cohort Analysis
steps: For each cohort_month: find all customers whose first purchase occurred in that month
For each subsequent month: calculate revenue retention percentage

computed_fields.formula: SUM(revenue_events.amount WHERE period_label = target.period_label AND is_recognized = true AND (revenue_category matches target.revenue_category OR target.revenue_category = 'all'))
SUM(revenue_events.amount WHERE customer_id = id AND is_recognized = true)
(count of customers from cohort with revenue in month N) / cohort_size * 100

domain_rules.rule: Unrecognized (deferred) revenue events are excluded from MRR and ARR calculations
domain_rules.api_guard: Filter WHERE is_recognized = true in all MRR/ARR aggregation queries

domain_rules.rule: recognition_date is required when is_recognized is false
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate that recognition_date is present when is_recognized = false; return 422 otherwise
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show recognition_date field as required when is_recognized toggle is off

domain_rules.rule: Refund events reduce revenue; amount is stored as a negative number
domain_rules.api_guard: Coerce amount to negative value when event_type = refund

domain_rules.rule: RevenueTarget period_label and revenue_category combination must be unique per org

domain_rules.api_guard: Validate cohort_size >= 1 before storing; return 422 otherwise

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
